analysis.reasoning: Core message: China completed assistance and reconstruction at Beirut Port after the explosion and vows continued support to UN peacekeeping to maintain world peace and stability. Evaluation: CH1 (The West is immoral, hostile and decadent) – Not present; the tweet does not mention or criticize the West. CH2 (China is a benevolent power) – Present; it highlights China’s constructive actions in UN peacekeeping, assistance, reconstruction, and commitment to world peace, fitting the cooperative, peace-promoting framing. CH3 (China has an epic history) – Not referenced; no historical narrative. CH4 (Appropriate political system and honorable values) – Not directly; the focus is international role, not domestic system or values. CH5 (CCP government succeeds) – Not applicable; there’s no claim about domestic governance success or technological/economic leadership. CH6 (Interesting culture/nature/heritage) – Not relevant. Conclusion: The tweet promotes CH2.
